label: Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning

node.label: Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning
node.definition: Supervised fine-tuning and instruction tuning train models on curated input–response examples so they follow task descriptions and conversational conventions.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning is to connect Supervised learning, Large-scale pretraining to downstream capabilities including Parameter-efficient tuning, adapters & LoRA, Reward-model training, RLHF & RLAIF, Direct and online preference optimization.
examples: substrate for Parameter-efficient tuning, adapters & LoRA
substrate for Reward-model training, RLHF & RLAIF
substrate for Direct and online preference optimization
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Large-scale pretraining.

dependencies.rationale: Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning uses Supervised learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning uses Large-scale pretraining as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning uses Labels, targets, rewards & preferences as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
